isSocial.description: Whether the identity provider is a social provider (true) or not (false).

access_token.description: IDP access token returned if scope `read:user_idp_tokens` is defined.

access_token_secret.description: IDP access token secret returned only if `scope read:user_idp_tokens` is defined.

refresh_token.description: IDP refresh token returned only if scope `read:user_idp_tokens` is defined.
